creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2009-06-30 13:15:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Parse-ExuberantCTags Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                  pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This Perl module parses ctags files and handles both traditional
  ctags as well as extended ctags files such as produced with Exuberant
  ctags.
  
  The module is implemented as a wrapper around the readtags library
  that normally ships with Exuberant ctags.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Parse-ExuberantCTags/
  
  PR:             ports/136146
  Submitted by:   Cezary Morga <cm@therek.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3534    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/devel/p5-Parse-ExuberantCTags/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Parse-ExuberantCTags/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/devel/p5-Parse-ExuberantCTags/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/p5-Parse-ExuberantCTags/pkg-plist (new)
